entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Africa characterized by semiarid areas and recurring droughts affecting agricultural productivity

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Periods of time without precipitation that can affect agricultural productivity and crop growth

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortages in agricultural regions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, which decreases during recurring droughts

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The date on which seeds are planted, which varies annually in semiarid West African regions

entities.name: ONSET OF RAINS
entities.description: The beginning of the rainy season used as the specific definition for the sowing date in each year

entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: A group of grass crops grown for their edible seeds, subject to drought risk during specific growth phases

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION PHASE
entities.description: A specific growth stage of cereal crops occurring around 20 days after sowing

entities.name: DROUGHT RISK
entities.description: The probability or likelihood of a crop suffering from water stress, which drops significantly after the panicle initiation phase

entities.name: MEAN ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The average amount of precipitation received in a year, used to predict the frequency of dry spells

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to crops to supplement rainfall during dry spells to maintain productivity

entities.name: CROP WATER REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The amount of water a crop needs to achieve maximum yield, informed by dry-spell analysis

entities.name: DRY-SPELL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The computation of probabilities and frequencies of dry spells to assess agricultural risk and inform crop management

entities.name: HISTORICAL RAINFALL DATA
entities.description: Past records of precipitation used to calculate the length of dry spells

entities.name: PROBABILITY DISTRIBUTION OF TIME TO THE NEXT WET DAY
entities.description: A statistical method used to compute the likelihood of the duration until the next rainfall event

entities.name: PERCENTAGE FREQUENCIES OF DRY SPELLS
entities.description: A calculation of how often dry spells of various lengths occur over a period

relationships.target: PROBABILITY DISTRIBUTION OF TIME TO THE NEXT WET DAY
